cards.back: A style of describing digital circuits using modules and their connections

cards.front: What is module in Verilog HDL?
cards.back: A building block of digital circuit described by a set of inputs, outputs and logic equations

cards.front: How does module instantiation work in Verilog HDL?
cards.back: Modules are instantiated by specifying the module name, input and output ports, and connection declarations

cards.front: What is the purpose of port declaration in Verilog HDL?
cards.back: To specify the direction and access of signals between modules

cards.front: What is the example of a simple circuit implemented using Verilog HDL?
cards.back: A full adder circuit can be implemented using Verilog HDL by defining modules for AND, OR, and XOR operations
